overview:
## Discussion

Use the [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIElementTypeQueryProvider/firstMatch] property when you know that there can only be one possible match for an element query. When you call [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIElementTypeQueryProvider/firstMatch], the framework stops traversing your app’s accessibility hierarchy as soon as it finds a matching element, speeding up element query resolution.

# firstMatch

**Instance Property**

The first element that matches the query.

## Declaration

```swift
var firstMatch: XCUIElement { get }
```

## Discussion

Use the [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIElementTypeQueryProvider/firstMatch] property when you know that there can only be one possible match for an element query. When you call [doc://com.apple.xcuiautomation/documentation/XCUIAutomation/XCUIElementTypeQueryProvider/firstMatch], the framework stops traversing your app’s accessibility hierarchy as soon as it finds a matching element, speeding up element query resolution.



## Related Documentation

- **element**: The query’s single matching element.
